summary: Solid test suite with comprehensive coverage of core functionality (glob patterns, label assignment, priority ordering, error handling) and GitHub Actions integration. Well-organized into logical test classes with clear naming and docstrings. Demonstrates TDD cycle comments and good fixture usage (tempfile, temp git repos). Main weaknesses: (1) test_fixture.json and label_config.json content not shown—cannot verify fixture quality; (2) brittle output parsing in run_tests.py using regex (CASE_LINE_RE) is fragile to format changes; (3) some edge cases untested (unicode in paths, very deep nesting, performance with large file lists); (4) unusual design with outer integration harness adds complexity; (5) workflow structure tests could validate more thoroughly (job dependencies, all expected jobs ran). Would catch most regressions in core logic but may miss some integration edge cases and output-format changes.
